name: Chicken Stir-Fry
notes: Chicken with broccoli, mushrooms, and carrots in a savory soy-sesame sauce. Serve over brown rice.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
notes: One-skillet meal with chicken, eggs, brown rice, bell peppers, and broccoli. Use cold/leftover brown rice for best results.

name: Egg Fried Rice with Edamame
notes: Meatless. Eggs + edamame over brown rice with bell peppers, peas, and carrots. The fastest dinner on the list.

name: 20-Minute Tofu Stir-Fry
notes: Fully plant-based. Tofu with colorful veggies in a savory sauce over brown rice or quinoa. Omit any avocado garnish.

name: Thai Peanut Noodles with Chicken
notes: Poached chicken with noodles in a creamy sesame-peanut sauce with red cabbage. Bold flavors. Sub tofu for plant-based version.

name: Thai Red Curry with Tofu
notes: Fragrant red curry paste with coconut milk, vegetables, and baked tofu. Serve over brown rice. Use Thai Kitchen red curry paste (vegetarian-friendly). A completely different flavor profile from tikka masala.

name: Easy Chicken Fajitas
notes: Chicken breast with bell peppers and onions in homemade seasoning. Serve with corn tortillas. Skip avocado/guacamole. Kids love assembling their own!

name: Ground Turkey Sweet Potato Skillet
notes: Southwest-spiced ground turkey with sweet potatoes, peppers, and onions. One-pan. Skip bean variation. Skip avocado topping. Great leftovers for lunch.

name: Crispy Baked Chicken Tacos
notes: Shredded rotisserie chicken with taco seasoning, loaded into corn tortillas with cheese and baked until crispy. Top with lettuce, tomato, salsa (no avocado).

name: Tofu Tacos
notes: Crumbled, spiced tofu cooked in a skillet — tastes remarkably like taco meat. Serve in corn tortillas with lettuce, tomato, and salsa. No beans needed in this recipe.

name: Shakshuka
notes: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato and bell pepper sauce. Serve with whole grain pita or crusty bread for dipping. Great "breakfast for dinner" alternative to frittata, with bolder North African/Middle Eastern spicing.

name: Spinach Frittata
notes: Egg-based dinner with loads of spinach, cheddar, and Parmesan. Serve with a simple salad or whole grain bread. Great "breakfast for dinner."

name: Turkey Meatballs with Marinara & Zucchini Noodles
notes: Baked turkey meatballs with homemade marinara and zucchini noodles (or regular pasta). A lighter Italian comfort food night with a different poultry. Kid-friendly.

name: Chicken Pasta Primavera
notes: Chicken breast with asparagus, peas, and a light cream sauce over pasta. Use whole wheat pasta for more fiber.

name: Sheet Pan Lemon Chicken with Rainbow Vegetables
notes: Chicken breasts with sweet potatoes, broccoli, and bell peppers in a lemon-Parmesan glaze. One pan, minimal cleanup. Serve as-is or over brown rice.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
notes: Restaurant-quality aromatic tomato-cream curry. Serve over basmati or brown rice, or with naan. Mild spice level — great for kids. Sub coconut milk for dairy-free.

name: Greek Turkey Meatballs with Tzatziki
notes: Herb-packed turkey meatballs with grated zucchini, served over brown rice or quinoa with tzatziki sauce. A lighter, Mediterranean spin on meatballs — different protein and flavor profile from the Italian version.

name: Greek Chicken Bowls
notes: Greek-marinated chicken over turmeric rice (or quinoa) with cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, feta, and homemade tzatziki. No marinade time needed. Skip chickpea variation and avocado.
